titleStmt.title: SII 25.88: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 88. (A.R. No. 88 of 1908.) ŚŌḺAPURAM, SIVAGANGAI TALUK, RAMANATHAPURAM DISTRICT.

summary.p: North, West and South bases of a ruined Gaṇēśa temple in the village.

p.hi: Māṟavarman Sundarapāṇḍya I Year: Lost (acc. 1216 A.D.)

summary.p: This fragmentary record in three pieces has been arranged as A, B and C. This disturbed inscription contains parts of the enlarged version of the praśasti beginning with Pūmaruviya, etc., of the king. From the extant portion available, it seems to register some gift to provide for foodofferings. The name of the officer who attested the grant made is not clear.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
—keraḷa ciṉaippuliyuṅ koṭuñcilaiyuṅkulain vāḷārnti poṟkirimel varikkayalkaḷ viḷaiyāṭa Iruṅkayalkaḷ viḷaiyāṭa Iruṅkaṭal valaiyata tiṉitaṟam perukak karuṅkali kaṭintu ceṅkol naṭappa Oru(ṅ)kuṭai niḻal Irunilaṅkaḷira muvakait tamiḻum muṟaimai vakai vetamu naviṉṟu—ḷara Aiyvakai veḻviyuñ ceyviḷai(yi*) yaṟṟa Aṟuvakaic camaiyamumaḻakuṭaṉ tikaḻa Eḻuvakaip pāṭalu muyaluṭaṉ parava Eṇṭicai yaḷavuñ cakkarañ cellak ko—Stones are disturbed and missing.
—ṭa maruḷeṉa voruvar muṉṉoruvar muṟai muṟai kaṭava tan tiṟaiñca Ilaṅkoḷi maṇimuṭi yintiraṉ pūṭṭiya pulaṅkatirāra mārviṉiṟ poliya paṉimalart tāmarait ticaimukaṉ paṭaitta maṉuneṟi taḻaippa maṇimuṭi cūṭip poṉṉi cūḻ nāṭṭup puli Āṇai poy—k kayilāṇai kaiva—veñciṉa vivuḷiyum veḻamum parappit tañcaiyu murantaiyuñ centaḻal koḷutti kāviyu nilamu niṉṟu kaviṉiṟappa vāviyu māṟu maṇi ni(r)raṇittu kūṭamu māḷikaiyuṅ ko—
—vicci cempiyaṉai veḷai koṇṭivaṉ teviyarai veḻa p paim poṉ maṇimuṭi paṟittu pāṇaṉukku kkuṭuttaruḷi pāṭalañ ciṟappiṟ parutivāṉṟoyu māṭakap puricai yāyirattutaḷiyiṟ coravaḷava ṉaviṣeka maṇṭalattu virar Aviṣeka vicaiyamākak kūṭi nāḷu—ki minnantaṟu kaṇ matac mel koṇṭu nirāḻivaiya muḻutum potu voḷittu kūrāḷiyuñ cey toḷumey koṇṭu poypaṭāta varumaṟaite(r) rantaṇar vāḻ teyvap puliyūr tiruvellaiyuṭ—
— ṅka vamainta miṉṉuñcapaiyāṉai piḷaviṭai koṇṭu vāṅkuciṟai yaṉṉan tuyiloḻiya vaṇṭeḻuppum pūṅkamalavāvi cūḻ poṉṉamarāpati Uḷḷirun tulakan tāṅku muyar meruvaik kuṇarntu vaittaṉaiya coti maṇi maṇṭapat—paḻanaṟ coṇāṭu veṉṟaḻaippavāṉ nilaikulaintu vāḷakirikkappuṟatte poṉ vaḷavaṉurimai yuṭaṉ pukuntu peṟṟa putalvaṉiṉ pereṉṟu muṉkāṭṭi maṟṟavaṉ maṅkala—
—ṉoṭi muṉṉuḻaṉṟa vemmaiyelāṅ kaiyalat tāṉo(r) tavam paṇṇi taṇṭār muṭiyuṭaṉe viṭṭa pukaliṭaṉṟaṉmār veḷaikkuttiriya miṭṭapaṭikku piṭipāṭituvāka poṅku nir—ñālattu pūpālar toḷa viḷaṅku ceṅkayal koṇṭu tirumukamum paṇṭiḻnta coḷapatiyeṉu—miḷavaḻaṅki viṭaikuṭu—viṭṭaruḷi Otakkaṭaṟ pāril ventar ṟṟa taṅkaḷ kaṭavuḷivaṉeṉ ṟeṇṇit talaiyuṟ ṟaṭaiyātār taṇṭaliṭaiyeṉṉa kiḷaiyuṟṟaṉṉa per muḻutuṅ keṭṭaruḷeṉṟetti va—
—kaḷpola takkiṇai ttu teṉkoṅkaṉ vantiṭṭa teṇṭaṉukku miṉpoṅka cāttiya Āparaṇan takkateṉa vaḻaṅki Ārāta perunaṇpiṉaic ciṟaiyumiṭṭu tirumālu nāṉmukaṉuñ cevitta ceṅkaṭ karumāl kaḷiṟṟuvaru mukkaṭ kaṭavu(ḷ) ḷivaṉeṉa māṭa maturaiyiṟ tāṉ pon— varkku tollaip puvikku miṇaṅkāmaṟ tāñ coṉṉa Ellaikkuḷ ṉiṟpa Icaivitta koṇṭivāṟu ceyyātoḻi yiliya maṉukkun nalviruntākkutu mumaiyeṉa viṭṭaruḷi—
—yum Okkac curuṇṭotuṅki karuvikkārāḷum veṭṭu raṇṭu mayaṅkak kaikoṇṭu velāvalaiyattu viḻntavaṉ poy naṭu—miṉavaṟkup pālkuṭamāmeṉṟu tamvirar koṉ mākamukaṭu taṭavi maḻai maṭukkum—
—yoḻiya ventalaṟk koṭuvāḷḷuyakalaniriṟcaiytu tekkulattu veṇkavaṭivitta viramuḻuteṭuttu pāṭum pa— moruṅkak kaikkoṇṭu—ṇip paṭṭaṅ kaṭṭi muṭicūṭi mārpillaṇai
—ra maṇṭapattiṟ pukku ticai to—k katirvel vaṭaventar tam pātam mekat taḻaiyaṇiya virakkaḻalaṇintu viḷa—yikale kuḻaiyarivaiyar toḻutu ni— muḻutuṭaiyāroṭum viṟṟiru Abhiṣekam paṇṇiyaruḷi—

—cantirātittavaṟ celvatākak kallile—
—taraiyaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai Eḻu—
—ippaṭikku Ivaimā muventa veḷā—
Digital edition of SII 25.88 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
